shelf.mod.config.option.layout.reset_ico: Reset Icon Alpha (Hover)
Alpha transparency value applied on reset icons when hovered.
Reset Icon Alpha (Default)
Alpha transparency value applied on reset icons in resting state.
Reset Icon Alpha (Disabled)
Alpha transparency value applied on reset icons when interactive actions are locked.
Reset Icon Active Red Channel
Red channel color tint multiplier for reset icons when option value differs from default.
Reset Icon Active Green Channel
Green channel color tint multiplier for reset icons when option value differs from default.
Reset Icon Active Blue Channel
Blue channel color tint multiplier for reset icons when option value differs from default.
Reset Icon Inactive Red Channel
Red channel color tint multiplier for reset icons when option value is equal to default.
Reset Icon Inactive Green Channel
Green channel color tint multiplier for reset icons when option value is equal to default.
Reset Icon Inactive Blue Channel
Blue channel color tint multiplier for reset icons when option value is equal to default.
